goal: Tackle the three speed fixes for pheromone injection: eliminate redundant process spawns, centralize validation, and add session-level caching

phases.description: Create benchmark functions for pr-context and colony-prime context assembly so all subsequent phases have measurable before/after data.
phases.name: Performance Baseline Benchmarks

tasks.goal: Add BenchmarkPRContext benchmark that invokes prContextCmd with fixture data, recording ns/op and allocs.
Add BenchmarkColonyPrime benchmark that invokes colonyPrimeCmd with fixture store, recording ns/op and allocs.

phases.description: Extract duplicated content validation into a single pkg-level function implementing all 5 documented sanitization rules, then wire it into pheromone-write and import paths.
phases.name: Centralize Content Sanitization
success_criteria: SanitizeSignalContent is the single validation entry point
pheromone_write.go and exchange.go both call it

tasks.goal: Create SanitizeSignalContent function in pkg/colony/sanitize.go enforcing max 500 chars, XML tag rejection, angle bracket escaping, prompt-injection rejection, shell injection blocking.
Wire SanitizeSignalContent into pheromone_write.go before content hashing, rejecting invalid content with clear error.
Wire SanitizeSignalContent into XML import path in cmd/exchange.go, skipping invalid signals rather than failing the entire import.

phases.description: Create pkg/cache package with session-scoped file caching for parsed JSON data, using .aether/data/ directory with .cache_ prefix and mtime-based invalidation.
phases.name: File-Based Session Cache Package
success_criteria: pkg/cache package compiles and tests pass
Cache keyed by (filename, mtime) with gob storage

tasks.goal: Create pkg/cache/session_cache.go with SessionCache struct that stores parsed JSON blobs keyed by (filename, mtime).
Add cache invalidation by mtime: if source file mtime differs from cached mtime, entry is stale and re-read from disk.
Add Clear method to remove all .cache_* files in .aether/data/, called at session end or on cache-clean command.

phases.description: Load COLONY_STATE.json once at the top of prContextCmd and reuse the parsed struct for all 5 subsequent reads. Also deduplicate pheromones.json loads.
phases.name: Deduplicate COLONY_STATE.json Loads in pr-context
success_criteria: COLONY_STATE.json loaded exactly once in prContextCmd
pheromones.json loaded exactly once in prContextCmd

tasks.goal: Refactor prContextCmd to load COLONY_STATE.json once and pass to all sections (colony_state, decisions, context_capsule, phase_learnings).
Deduplicate pheromones.json loads: section 4 (signals) and extractSignalTexts both load it — refactor to load once and pass PheromoneFile.

phases.description: Ensure pheromones.json is not redundantly loaded across colony-prime, pheromone-prime, and pheromone-display within a single session.
phases.name: Deduplicate Pheromone Loads Across Commands

tasks.goal: Refactor colonyPrimeCmd to accept pre-loaded pheromones from shared load rather than loading independently.
Extract shared loadPheromonesOnce function in cmd/ that uses session cache if available, falling back to direct file read.

phases.description: Deduplicate the 4 git process spawns in context.go: resolveAetherRootPath() spawns git rev-parse 3x, detectGitBranch() spawns once. Cache results for command lifetime.
phases.name: Eliminate Redundant Git Process Spawns
success_criteria: resolveAetherRootPath spawns git at most once per prContextCmd
detectGitBranch spawns git at most once per prContextCmd
Benchmark shows improvement over phase 1 baseline

tasks.goal: Refactor resolveAetherRootPath to accept optional cached value; in prContextCmd call it once and store result.
Cache detectGitBranch result for command lifetime, verifying no other code path re-calls it within same invocation.
Re-run benchmarks from phase 1 and verify git spawn count dropped from 4 to at most 2 with measurable ns/op improvement.

phases.description: Audit skills.go for redundant file reads within single command invocations and deduplicate them.
phases.name: Eliminate Redundant Spawns in Skill Pipeline
success_criteria: Skills pipeline has no redundant process spawns or duplicate file reads

tasks.goal: Audit skills.go for all exec.Command calls and redundant file reads; document findings.
If redundant reads found in skill-index or skill-match, deduplicate by loading once and passing parsed result.

phases.description: Integrate the session cache package into pr-context, context-capsule, and colony-prime so repeated loads within a session hit cache instead of disk.
phases.name: Wire File Cache into Context Assembly Commands
success_criteria: All three context assembly commands use SessionCache
Cache hit logged or measurable via benchmark

tasks.goal: Initialize SessionCache at start of prContextCmd, use it for COLONY_STATE.json and pheromones.json loads.
Wire SessionCache into colonyPrimeCmd for COLONY_STATE.json, pheromones.json, and instincts.json loads.
Wire SessionCache into contextCapsuleCmd for its COLONY_STATE.json and pheromones.json loads.

phases.description: Add cache cleanup to prevent stale .cache_* files from accumulating across sessions.
phases.name: Cache Cleanup and Session Hygiene
success_criteria: Auto-cleanup runs at context assembly start

tasks.goal: Add cache-clean subcommand to aether CLI that calls SessionCache.Clear() and reports files removed.
Add auto-cleanup at start of each context assembly command: delete .cache_* files older than 24 hours.

phases.description: End-to-end verification that all three speed fixes work together and existing functionality is preserved.
phases.name: Integration Verification
success_criteria: Full test suite passes with race detection

tasks.goal: Run full test suite: go test ./... -race and verify zero failures.
Run benchmarks from phase 1 and compare against baseline. Verify measurable improvement in ns/op.
Verify sanitization rejects malicious content end-to-end: write signal with XML tags (rejected), write valid signal (stored and appears in output).

learnings.claim: PRContext baseline: ~20.8ms/1989 allocs per call; ColonyPrime baseline: ~266us/921 allocs per call
learnings.evidence: Benchmarks run successfully with go test -bench

learnings.claim: Realistic fixture data with 5 data sources produces meaningful benchmark measurements
learnings.evidence: setupBenchmarkStore creates colony state, pheromones, flags, midden, rolling summary, instincts, queen/hive wisdom

events: 2026-04-08T10:21:04Z|colony_initialized|init|Colony initialized with goal: Tackle the three speed fixes for pheromone injection: eliminate redundant process spawns, centralize validation, and add session-level caching
